name: verl-subagent-union-workflow
description: Explicitly triggered Codex controller for VERL and Ascend/NPU multi-agent optimization workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit Codex controller for VERL/NPU optimization phases.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that starts a controller-only workflow for VERL and Ascend/NPU optimization runs. It uses repo-scoped Codex custom agents and only triggers when explicitly invoked.
